output.summary: Implemented all 7 fixes from planning document: fixed JS breakpoint mismatch (48rem → 60rem), synced TSX/PHP nav list responsive classes, removed conditional wrapper around desktop right column, added ArrowDown/ArrowUp keyboard support on closed submenu buttons, added Home/End key support in submenus, added aria-label to submenu containers in both TSX and PHP, and updated test page with DemoContainer wrappers.

changes: Line 4: Changed media query from `window.matchMedia('(min-width: 48rem)')` to `window.matchMedia('(min-width: 60rem)')` to match theme's md breakpoint
Lines 297-321: Added keydown event listener on submenu buttons to handle ArrowDown (open menu + focus first item) and ArrowUp (open menu + focus last item) when menu is closed
Lines 364-375: Added Home and End key handlers in handleSubmenuKeydown to focus first/last items in submenu

Line 128: Updated innerBlocksProps className from `flex gap-8 items-start justify-end flex-wrap list-none p-0 m-0` to `flex md:flex-row md:gap-8 md:items-start md:justify-end md:flex-wrap max-md:flex-col max-md:gap-8 max-md:w-full list-none p-0 m-0` to match PHP responsive classes
Line 611: Removed conditional wrapper `{(displayContent || hasSearchLink || hasSepLink) && (...)}` around desktop right column div so it always renders (matching PHP behavior)
Line 67: Added `aria-label="<?php echo esc_attr( $linkTitle . ' submenu' ); ?>"` attribute to submenu container div[role='menu']
Line 174: Added `aria-label={ `${ attributes.link?.title || 'Menu' } submenu` }` attribute to submenu container div[role='menu']

warnings: Experimental API warnings in other blocks (not Header, not blocking)

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP nav list classes now match. Desktop right column rendering behavior now matches (always rendered). Submenu aria-label added to both TSX and PHP.

testPage.title: TEST: Header
scenarios: Full Content - All fields populated with logo, search, SEP link, mobile CTA, multiple nav items with submenus
Minimal Content - Logo and 2 simple nav items only
Hide on Scroll Down (Desktop + Mobile) - Both hide-on-scroll-down enabled
Hide on Scroll Down (Desktop Only) - Desktop hides, mobile stays fixed
Not Fixed on Scroll - Header scrolls with page content
Submenu Alignment Right - Right-aligned dropdown positioning
Many Nav Items (Overflow) - 8 items to test flex-wrap
Long Submenu Items - Long titles to test text wrapping
SEP Link Only (No Search URL) - SEP link without search URL

fixesApplied.description: JS breakpoint mismatch causing inert attribute and menu state issues in 768-959px range
TSX/PHP nav list class sync - mobile responsive layout classes missing in TSX
fixesApplied.fix: Updated TSX innerBlocksProps className to match PHP with md: and max-md: prefixed classes

fixesApplied.description: TSX conditional wrapper around desktop right column differs from PHP (always renders in PHP)
fixesApplied.fix: Removed conditional wrapper in TSX to match PHP behavior

fixesApplied.description: Submenu buttons lack ArrowDown/ArrowUp keyboard support when closed
fixesApplied.fix: Added keydown handler on buttons to open menu and focus first/last item

fixesApplied.description: Submenu keyboard navigation missing Home/End key support
fixesApplied.fix: Added Home (focus first) and End (focus last) handlers to handleSubmenuKeydown
Added aria-label with parent item title + ' submenu' in both TSX and PHP

nextSteps: Functional QA: Test keyboard navigation (ArrowDown/ArrowUp on closed submenu buttons, Home/End in open submenus)
Functional QA: Test breakpoint behavior at 960px to verify JS/CSS now match
Design QA: Verify mobile nav list layout with new responsive classes
Design QA: Verify desktop right column always renders even without search URL
